elements.text:
You are at work and hear some of your coworkers having a conversation behind you. As you listen, you realize that you were not invited to a small gathering, and a few of your coworkers and friends were all hanging out without you. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I really want to ask my coworkers why I wasn't invited, but decide that I don't need to ask.
I say something nice to them.
I want to cry, but remind myself that I've hung out with some of these friends and coworkers without everyone there.
I reach out to one of my coworkers and let them know I would love to hang out with them next time.
I decide to avoid talking to my coworkers when possible.
